usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural test with no AI. All 6 phases passed: single-day write/read round-trips summary and date correctly, multi-day write preserves all 3 days with correct summaries/dates/item counts, partial fields (summary-only and date-only) behave as expected with Day N fallback, empty days truncates to zero items, and replacement semantics fully overwrite prior data with no stale items.
